lines.english: I am an orphan - I seek Your Sanctuary, God.
All beings and creatures take Your Support.
Be merciful, God, and save me. ||2||
Our All-powerful Lord and Master is the Doer of all, the Cause of all causes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਮੁਨਿ ਜਨ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਸੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: sur nar mun jan taa kee sev |
lines.english: The angelic beings and silent sages serve Him.
God is the Destroyer of fear, the Remover of pain and suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਣਿ ਅਕਾਸੁ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਕਲਾ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: dharan akaas jaa kee kalaa maeh |
lines.english: The earth and the sky are in His Power.
All beings eat what You give them. ||3||
O Merciful God, O Searcher of hearts,
please bless Your slave with Your Glance of Grace.
Please be kind and bless me with this gift,
that Nanak may live in Your Name. ||4||10||
Basant, Fifth Mehl:
Meditating on the Lord of the Universe, all darkness is dispelled.
Loving the Lord, one's sins are taken away.
Meditating on the Lord, one does not suffer at all.
Meditating in remembrance on the Lord, the cycle of reincarnation comes to an end. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਸਿਉ ਸਦਾ ਸੰਗੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa siau sadaa sang |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am always with the humble Saints. ||1||Pause||
The love of the Lord is springtime for me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਭਗਤੁ ਸੋ ਧੰਨਿ ਦੇਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeh gobind bhagat so dhan des |
lines.english: Blessed is that country where the devotees of the Lord of the Universe dwell.
The Saints have shared the Teachings with me.
But that place where the Lord's devotees are not, is wilderness.
By Guru's Grace, realize the Lord in each and every heart. ||2||
Sing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, and enjoy the nectar of His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਪਾਪ ਕਰਤ ਤੂ ਸਦਾ ਸੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: man paap karat too sadaa sang |
lines.english: O mortal, you must always restrain yourself from committing sins.
I focus my meditation on the Lord's Lotus Feet.
Here and hereafter, God shall resolve your affairs. ||3||
Behold the Creator Lord God near at hand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਿਆ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਬਾਛਉ ਧੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: teriaa sant janaa kee baachhau dhoor |
lines.english: I yearn for the dust of the feet of Your Saints.
Nanak meditates on his Lord and Master, who is ever-present, near at hand. ||4||11||
Granting His Grace, God has blessed me with this Gift.
Basant, Fifth Mehl:
By Guru's Grace, I continually chant His Name.
God is my Protector, my Mother and Father.
The True Transcendent Lord is always new, forever fresh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਸਮੁ ਧਿਆਈ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਇਕ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: khasam dhiaaee ik man ik bhaae |
lines.english: I meditate on my Lord and Master, single-mindedly, with love.
Meditating in remembrance on Him, I do not suffer in sorrow. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਸਦਾ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਾਹਿਬਿ ਰਖਿਆ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore kee sadaa saranaaee saachai saahib rakhiaa kantth laae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I seek the Sanctuary of the Perfect Guru forever. My True Lord and Master hugs me close in His Embrace. ||1||Pause||
The demons and wicked enemies have grown weary of struggling against Him.
God Himself protects His humble servants.
The record of their past actions cannot be erased.
Wandering through the lands and foreign countries, people only grow tired and suffer in pain. ||2||
Without the True Guru, there is no place to go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕਉ ਪਹੁਚਿ ਨ ਸਕਸਿ ਕੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jan kau pahuch na sakas koe |3|
lines.english: No one can rival the humble servant of the Lord. ||3||
The Lord Himself is the Protector of His humble servants.
They harvest and eat what they have planted.
God's Glory is perfect and unbroken.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਦਾਸ ਰਖੇ ਕਰਿ ਜਤਨੁ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: prabh daas rakhe kar jatan aap |
lines.english: By His own efforts, God protects His slave.
So sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe with your tongue forever.
Basant, Fifth Mehl:
Nanak lives by meditating on the Feet of the Lord. ||4||12||
Dwelling at the Guru's Feet, pain and suffering go away.
All my desires and tasks are fulfilled.
Chanting the Lord's Name, Nanak lives. ||1||
The Supreme Lord God has shown mercy to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਦੀਸੈ ਬਿਲਲਾਂਤੀ ਸਾਕਤੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਵੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur deesai bilalaantee saakat fir fir aavai jaavai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, the world weeps. The faithless cynic comes and goes in reincarnation, over and over again. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਰੁਤਿ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਚਿਤਿ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: saa rut suhaavee jit har chit aavai |
lines.english: How beautiful is that season, when the Lord fills the mind.
